faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Corona, Queens?
faqs.answer: Corona residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants. Pavement ants typically nest in cracks in sidewalks and foundations, carpenter ants can damage wooden structures in older homes, and odorous house ants are attracted to kitchens and food sources. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in Corona?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Corona locations. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection at your convenience and can often begin treatment immediately. Most ant control services are completed in a single visit, with follow-up appointments scheduled as needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our ant control service includes a thorough inspection of your Corona property, identification of ant species and entry points, interior and exterior treatment application, nest elimination where accessible, and sealing of common entry points. The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and ant species. We provide a detailed quote after our initial inspection.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for my family and pets in my Corona home?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We can also provide green and organic treatment options upon request. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment, though most products we use allow you to remain in your home during application.
